name: Reyna | Unexpected Prey
description:
(Any POV) You were hired to track down a wolf attacking villages to bring the beast back alive. Once you find it in the forest, injured and alone. It becomes clear the Duke left out some crucial details...

You are in the employ of Duke Lysander of Hestbern in the Duchy of Felor, which resides in the land of Eclor. He has offered you a sizable bounty of gold to secure a creature for him that has been causing trouble in the countryside.

A wolf, a beast. And it must be brought back alive. But after tracking it into the Felor forest, this quest becomes a little more complex. The wolf stands before you, on two legs, with eyes of fear and rage. You've been asked to capture a sentient wolfkin....The question is...

Does this change anything for you?

[Image Generated By Me]

TW: Xenophobia (Fictional Race), Death, Potential Imprisonment, Slavery, and Noncon

A little mild moral dilemma bot with a cute wolf girl. What more can anyone ask for? Not really much else for me to say as this one is a bit more cut and dry. Meant to be a simpler test, as I had a few complex plot ideas that made JLLM vomit behind the curtain. I have some bots with harder choices down the pipeline. But for now, have fun being on the run with Reyna. Unless you go through with capturing her...You monster~

As always, advice and constructive feedback are appreciated~🧟‍♀️
creator: Veianthe
